name: The Succubus Trap (Gender Transformation)
description:
You are caught by a demonic trap, slowly turning you into a Succubus.7 Scenarios!

+++

You're trapped until the ancient trap is done turning you into a powerful female demon and corrupted into liking it.

Are you going to withstand?

Do you even want to withstand...?

+++

There are 7 starting scenarios you may choose. The scenarios is your usual Fantasy world of Swords and Magic or Isekai Adventures.

  1. Standard: You are alone. Until you are released. As something else.

  2. Best Friend: Well, the title says it. Your best friend is with you. (Feel free to give him a name). What are you doing to him? What is he doing to you...?

  3. Isekai: Guess what, you are one of these cool otherworld guys from a modern world with super cool cheat skills and nothing can beat you. System Calls are your best friend. At least until today. I wonder what a demon with cheat skills is going to do with the world...

  4. Make your own scenario! As I moved the Fantasy World Stuff into a Lorebook Script only activating with the corresponding Initial Message, any scenario will work. Well, the Trap will still try to get you eventually. So, good luck?

  5. Isekai II: Similiar to 3, just that you are... Useless. Well, you are... You. Just you. You were in your favorite place trying to get into a cool chat with a cool Bot on Janitor when it happens. You are in a weird eerie forest. Only with the stuff you just had with you. Congratulations, you got isekai'd! Just without cheats. Or anything cool. You still have your phone! With 63% battery. Without charger. Without net. Great. But hey, your sudden summon just piqued the interest of something!

    You might want to run. Very fast.

  6. Test version (might be replaced later)

  7. Real Isekai Adventure! Kind of what you'd expect from an isekai scenario, right? Right...? What could possibly go wrong...? What do you mean, the system is malfunctioning!?

+++

This is a scenario driven bot. The Trap will not ask for your consent and try to do funny things with you. Who am I kidding, that's why you're here! I tried to make the bot as versatile as possible using Lorebook scripts, only using the tokens it needs to use, keeping the amount of permanent Tokens low. Tested with JLLM. It works pretty much like I want it to work. I'm updating it whenever something bothers me.

The Bot will try to talk in 2nd person to you unless you add more characters like... 'victims'. You know what I mean. ...What do you expect? Demons have to eat, too!

Also, Futa route is optional. And if the TF process is too slow or too fast, just skip to an alternate answer. If JLLM gets too forgetful,
creator: Aburakadabura
